findings.description: Premature commit of a removal (backward compat) based on quick user feedback, then immediate revert when user reconsidered. 3 commits for net-zero change.
findings.proposedRule: When a user suggests removing a feature, confirm the reasoning before committing the removal.

findings.description: Rewrote protocols/git.md and skills but forgot CLAUDE.md still said 'Trunk-based'. Wiring gate caught 2 stale descriptions. CLAUDE.md is the entry point Claude reads first.
findings.proposedRule: When modifying a protocol or skill, check CLAUDE.md and DESIGN.md for stale descriptions.

findings.description: WU1 and WU2 evidence both wrote to shared feature directory, overwriting WU1 files. Each work unit needs its own work directory for evidence isolation.
findings.proposedRule: Each work unit gets its own work directory at .specwright/work/{work-unit-id}/.

findings.description: sw-init constraints referenced AskUserQuestion but it wasn't in allowed-tools frontmatter. Wiring gate caught it.
findings.proposedRule: When adding tool references to a skill's constraints, update the allowed-tools frontmatter.

findings.description: Config-driven protocol pattern: git.md reads all behavior from config.json with a strategy enum. Skills don't hardcode variation. Protocol becomes a decision tree, config is the input.
findings.proposedRule: When a protocol needs to support variation, parameterize via config.json with a strategy enum and per-field defaults.
